title: How do I create a Smart Spreadsheet template for all items on a board?
excerpt: I’ve installed Smart Spreadsheet and created a rental schedule calculator (this is for commercial real estate) in Smart Spreadsheet within an item.  I would like to use this spreadsheet as a template for all items on thi…

posts.author: TricoLester (Lester Ip)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve installed Smart Spreadsheet and created a rental schedule calculator (this is for commercial real estate) in Smart Spreadsheet within an item. I would like to use this spreadsheet as a template for all items on this board and make it readily available in the item view. How do I accomplish that?

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TricoLester ,

You may export your Smart Spreadsheet with a default table of a rental calculator in a .tfss format (it’s a special spreadsheet format that stores everything as it is: formulas, formatting, dropdowns, etc.). Then all you need to do is to import it back to your required items as an Item View and type in your data.

Best regards,
Katerina Kovriga
